description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with lush green trees and hedges. The house features a dark exterior with white-framed windows and a flat, light-colored roof. A driveway leads to a detached garage on one side, while the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The property is enclosed by a combination of wooden and hedge fencing, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The landscaping includes both tall and short trees, as well as manicured bushes lining the perimeter. The overall design is clean, geometric, and functional, with an emphasis on symmetry and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark exterior, white-framed windows, and a detached garage, surrounded by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, steps, and a lush front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and a row of hedges along the property line.
description_view_2: Rear view with dense tree coverage, backyard space, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden fence, more trees, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single door framed by windows and landscaping.
